title: lycianthes laevis var. kotoensis
intro: Lycianthes laevis var. kotoensis, also known as the Kotoensis nightshade or Kotoensis Lycianthes, is a type of flowering plant in the Solanaceae family, native to Japan. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its roots and leaves. The health benefits of Lycianthes laevis var. kotoensis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
